name: PRadar
description: Surfaces your full PR review queue every morning. Flags stale PRs, posts digests to Slack and Notion before standup starts.

schemes.label: Connect GitHub + Slack + Notion
schemes.instructions: Paste your GitHub PAT. Set NOTION_KEY, SLACK_TOKEN as Worker secrets.

tools.name: list_open_prs
tools.description: Fetch all open pull requests across configured repos

tools.name: compute_review_wait
tools.description: Calculate how long each PR has been waiting for review

tools.name: flag_stale_prs
tools.description: Flag PRs waiting over 24h or labelled blocked

tools.name: write_standup_entry
tools.description: Write PR digest to today's Notion daily page

tools.name: post_digest
tools.description: Post formatted digest to team Slack channel

tools.name: alert_critical_prs
tools.description: Send platform desktop notification for critical PRs

tools.name: get_repo_health
tools.description: Compute a 0-100 repo health score based on wait times

tools.name: snooze_pr
tools.description: Snooze a PR to remove it from the stale list

tools.name: assess_pr_risk
tools.description: Analyse PR code diffs and tag each PR with a risk score (low/medium/high) based on files changed

tools.name: post_risk_comment
tools.description: Post a formatted risk-analysis comment directly on high-risk GitHub PRs

tools.name: auto_assign_prs
tools.description: Auto-assign a reviewer to unassigned PRs that have been waiting too long

tools.name: list_open_issues
tools.description: Fetch all open GitHub issues across monitored repos, sorted by age

tools.name: draft_code_fix
tools.description: Generate an AI code fix for a GitHub issue using Construct LLM and post it as a comment
